title: Upgrade and Centralize Salesforce REST API Version Number
description:
Upgrade the Salesforce REST API version to v60.0 to enable access to non-profile cloud objects (e.g., Industry Cloud objects). Additionally, centralize the version number into a single configuration point so future upgrades only require changing one value.

A Laravel singleton service container was registered in `AppServiceProvider.php` to provide the Salesforce API version number across all pages that use the REST API.
acceptance_criteria: Salesforce REST API version is upgraded to v60.0
Non-profile cloud objects are accessible through the API
Version number is centralized in a Laravel singleton service container
All Salesforce API calls reference the centralized version number
Future version upgrades require only a single code change
middleware_changes: Registered a singleton 'sales_version_number' in AppServiceProvider.php that returns the Salesforce API version string. All Salesforce REST API calls now reference this singleton instead of hardcoded version strings.
api_changes: Salesforce REST API version upgraded from previous version to v60.0. All API calls now use the centralized version configuration.
implementation_notes: The singleton is registered in AppServiceProvider.php with an auth check. The version string is available application-wide via app('sales_version_number'). This pattern allows single-point upgrades for future Salesforce API version changes.
comment_summary: Waqar implemented the version upgrade and centralization using a Laravel singleton in AppServiceProvider.php, making future version updates a single-line change.
